title: The weighted two-cell P0 projection is L2-stable

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For nonnegative masses and nonzero total mass, the weighted squared L2 energy of the P0 projection is no larger than the original weighted energy.
informal.expected_conclusion: The weighted projected energy is bounded above by the original weighted energy.

declarations.name: weightedP0Projection2_l2_contract
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_l2_contract (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) <= weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate weighted L2 stability of the two-cell P0 projection into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0Projection2_l2_contract (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) <= weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by rewriting with the weighted Pythagorean identity and using nonnegativity of residual energy.
tasks.target: Rewrite by weightedP0Projection2_pythagorean, then use weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2_nonneg and le_add_of_nonneg_right.

tasks.input: Find the LeanNumerics identity and nonnegativity lemma needed for weighted L2 stability.
